evals.prompt:
我想从数据分析师转行做产品经理。这是我看中的一个JD：

【产品经理 - 某AI创业公司】
岗位职责：
1. 负责AI SaaS产品的需求分析与功能规划
2. 与研发团队协作，推动产品迭代
3. 进行用户调研，收集反馈并转化为产品需求
4. 制定产品路线图，跟踪关键指标

任职要求：
1. 2年以上产品经理经验
2. 熟悉AI/大模型产品优先
3. 优秀的数据分析能力
4. 良好的跨部门沟通能力

我的背景：
- 3年数据分析师，在字节跳动做用户增长分析
- 熟练SQL/Python/Tableau
- 做过一个个人AI小工具的side project
- 本科统计学

请帮我做JD分析和简历改写。
evals.expected_output: Should produce: JD analysis with P1/P2/P3 tiering, gap analysis mapping data analyst skills to PM requirements, ask about interview preference, then generate a tailored resume in Chinese. Should identify data analysis as a transferable strength and lack of PM title as the main gap.

assertions.name: jd_analysis_produced
assertions.description: Phase 2 JD analysis output file exists

assertions.name: gap_analysis_produced
assertions.description: Phase 3 gap analysis output file exists

assertions.name: resume_produced
assertions.description: Tailored resume output file exists

assertions.name: interview_prep_produced
assertions.description: Interview prep guide produced (interview was conducted)

assertions.name: cognitive_summary_produced
assertions.description: Cognitive summary produced (interview was conducted)

assertions.name: p1_p2_p3_tiering
assertions.description: JD analysis includes priority tiering (P1/P2/P3)

assertions.name: language_match_cn
assertions.description: Analysis outputs are in Chinese (matching user's language)

assertions.name: transferable_skills_mapped
assertions.description: Gap analysis maps data analyst skills to PM requirements with explicit migration logic

evals.prompt:
I'm a mechanical engineer looking to transition into developer relations at a tech company. Here are 3 JDs I'm considering:

JD1: Developer Advocate at Vercel - requires 2+ years DevRel, strong technical writing, public speaking, open source contributions

JD2: Developer Relations Engineer at Stripe - requires software engineering background, API documentation experience, community building

JD3: Technical Community Manager at GitHub - requires community management, content creation, event planning, developer ecosystem understanding

My background:
- 4 years mechanical engineer at Boeing
- Run a popular YouTube channel about 3D printing (15K subscribers)
- Contribute to open source CAD tools on GitHub
- Give talks at local maker meetups
- Built a personal blog with Next.js

I want the full workflow - analysis, gap assessment, interview, and resume.
evals.expected_output: Should produce: multi-JD competency synthesis across 3 DevRel roles, identify YouTube/open source/speaking as strong transferable evidence, run structured interview, generate English resume. Should handle the multi-JD mode properly with cross-role competency clusters.

assertions.name: multi_jd_synthesis
assertions.description: Analysis synthesizes across all 3 JDs with competency clusters and frequency counts

assertions.name: jd_analysis_produced
assertions.description: Phase 2 JD analysis output file exists

assertions.name: gap_analysis_produced
assertions.description: Phase 3 gap analysis output file exists

assertions.name: interview_prep_produced
assertions.description: Interview prep guide output file exists

assertions.name: cognitive_summary_produced
assertions.description: Cognitive summary output file exists

assertions.name: multiple_resumes
assertions.description: At least 2 tailored resumes produced for different roles

assertions.name: english_throughout
assertions.description: All outputs in English matching user's language

evals.prompt:
我有两份JD想投，一份是拓竹科技的海外内容营销，一份是Machinepulse的Agent Content Operations。我已经有现成的简历了，在这个路径：cv-2026/Somewhere in AI Industry/ZH/戴绮呈-海外内容营销&产品营销.md

请帮我针对这两个岗位分别生成简历，不需要interview，直接出简历就行。拓竹的用中文，Machinepulse的用英文。
evals.expected_output: Should respect the user's request to skip interview. Must still produce JD analysis and gap analysis (mandatory phases). Should read the existing resume, generate two resumes with different emphasis. Should NOT produce interview prep or cognitive summary (per skip-interview deliverable rules).
files: cv-2026/Somewhere in AI Industry/ZH/戴绮呈-海外内容营销&产品营销.md

assertions.name: interview_skipped
assertions.description: Agent respects user's request to skip interview

assertions.name: cn_resume_produced
assertions.description: Chinese resume for 拓竹科技 produced

assertions.name: en_resume_produced
assertions.description: English resume for Machinepulse produced

assertions.name: jd_analysis_produced
assertions.description: JD analysis produced even when interview is skipped (Phase 2 is mandatory)

assertions.name: gap_analysis_produced
assertions.description: Gap analysis produced even when interview is skipped (Phase 3 is mandatory)

assertions.name: no_interview_prep
assertions.description: No interview prep guide produced (skip-interview delivers only 3 items)

assertions.name: no_cognitive_summary
assertions.description: No cognitive summary produced (skip-interview delivers only 3 items)

assertions.name: existing_resume_read
assertions.description: Agent reads the user's existing resume before generating
